scripts.verify: bun run typecheck && bun run test
scripts.redis:flush: docker compose exec redis redis-cli FLUSHALL
scripts.reset: bun run docker:destroy && (turbo daemon stop >/dev/null 2>&1 || true) && rm -rf .turbo/daemon && (turbo daemon clean >/dev/null 2>&1 || true) && find . -name .turbo -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} + && find . -name node_modules -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} + && find . -name dist -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} +
